chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Acctt. Acquittal Appeal No. 06 of 2007 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For hearing of MA No. 963/2009 2. For hearing of MA No. 6147/2010 3. For hearing of main case 16.10.2025 Syed Meeral Shah, Special Prosecutor NAB Mr. Raj Ali Wahid Kunwar Advocate for the Petitioner in CPD- 6397 of 2024.-.-.-.-.-. We have asked the Learned Special Prosecutor NAB for grounds that this appeal should be admitted. 18 years have passed and this appeal is yet to be admitted. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB has reiterated the facts of the case, however, he has been completely unable to show any misreading or non-reading of evidence in the impugned judgment, any jurisdictional issue, any observation or finding which according to NAB is capricious, arbitrary or perverse. Needless to say, a double presumption of innocence works in favour of the Respondents. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB has been failed to justify why appeal should be admitted. Appeal is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE
